tags.name: `mc-textarea`
tags.description: Purpose: A multi-line text input field that allows users to enter and edit larger amounts of text. Category: Forms When to use: When you need to capture a larger block of text from the user. When not to use: For single-line text inputs or when a more compact input is needed. Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs Alternative component names: Text Area, Multi Line Input, Text Box Events: * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered. * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is focused. * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is going out of focus. * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-textarea click. * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed. Slots: * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-textarea. * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-textarea. * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-textarea. Attributes: * `autofocus` {`boolean`} - The autofocus global attribute is a Boolean attribute indicating that an element should be focused on page load, or when the that it is part of is displayed. * `cols` {`number`} - Number of columns. * `errormessage` {`string`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the checkbox. * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only. * `hint` {`string`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `id` {`string`} - Sets id for the input field. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - If `true`, checkbox border is red and the `errormessage` can be displayed if provided. * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property. It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`. * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - Position od the label and text alignment within label. * `maxlength` {`number | undefined`} - Setting this property will activate a character counter and limit the number of characters that can be entered in the textarea. * `minlength` {`number`} - Minimum number of characters required in the textarea. * `placeholder` {`string`} - The `placeholder` attribute specifies a short hint that describes the expected value of a field (e.g. a sample value or a short description of the expected format). * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets textarea to `readonly` state. * `rows` {`number`} - The height of the textarea will depend on the number of rows. * `width` {`string`} - The width of the inner input container in percentage. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets textarea to `disabled` state. * `name` {`string`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element. * `value` {`string | null | undefined`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a form element. * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - * `type` {`string | undefined`} - * `required` {`boolean`} - Sets textarea to `required` state. Properties: * `charCounter` {`boolean`} - * `textarea` {`HTMLTextAreaElement | undefined`} - * `focused` {`boolean`} - * `inputId` {`string`} - * `autofocus` {`boolean`} - The autofocus global attribute is a Boolean attribute indicating that an element should be focused on page load, or when the that it is part of is displayed. * `cols` {`number`} - Number of columns. * `errormessage` {`string`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the checkbox. * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only. * `hint` {`string`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `id` {`string`} - Sets id for the input field. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - If `true`, checkbox border is red and the `errormessage` can be displayed if provided. * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property. It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`. * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - Position od the label and text alignment within label. * `maxlength` {`number | undefined`} - Setting this property will activate a character counter and limit the number of characters that can be entered in the textarea. * `minlength` {`number`} - Minimum number of characters required in the textarea. * `placeholder` {`string`} - The `placeholder` attribute specifies a short hint that describes the expected value of a field (e.g. a sample value or a short description of the expected format). * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets textarea to `readonly` state. * `rows` {`number`} - The height of the textarea will depend on the number of rows. * `width` {`string`} - The width of the inner input container in percentage. * `focus` - Focuses the textarea * `blur` - Takes the focus out of the textarea. * `setAriaLabel` - Sets `arealabel` of the textarea. * `input` - Input in the mc-textarea. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets textarea to `disabled` state. * `_onMouseDown` - * `name` {`string`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element. * `value` {`string | null | undefined`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a form element. * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - * `type` {`string | undefined`} - * `required` {`boolean`} - Sets textarea to `required` state. * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - * `controlType` {`string`} - * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description:
`autofocus` {`boolean`} - The autofocus global attribute is a Boolean attribute indicating that an element should be focused on page load, or when the <dialog> that it is part of is displayed.

Property: autofocus

Default: false
